stemHtml: What is correct concerning the L1 and L2 NAVSTAR GPS transmission frequencies and codes?

options.a: The C/A code is for authorised (military) use only. It is transmitted on both L1 and L2.
options.b: The C/A code is the only code available for civilian use. It is transmitted only on L1.
options.c: The P code is the only code available for civilian use. It is transmitted only on L1.
options.d: The P code is for authorised (military) use only. It is transmitted only on L2.
